value.found_quote: In the Codex App, add remote projects from an SSH host and run threads against the remote filesystem and shell. Remote project threads run commands, read files, and write changes on the remote host.
value.rationale: The page's "Connect to an SSH host" section explicitly describes connecting the Codex App to an SSH host and running threads against the remote filesystem and shell, directly matching the claim. No deprecation or sunset language is present.
